generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

  GERENTE

  SUPERVISOR_ASEO

  PROSPECTO
  PROVEEDOR
}

  REFERIDO
  LICITACION
  OTRO
}

  CONTACTADO
  VISITA_AGENDADA
  LEVANTAMIENTO
  COTIZANDO
  NEGOCIACION
  GANADO
  PERDIDO

  ANULADA

//////////////////////////////////////////////////////
// USER
//////////////////////////////////////////////////////

model User {
  id String @id @default(cuid())

  nombre String
  apellido String

  email String @unique
  password String

  telefono String?
  cargo String?
  avatar String?

  color String @default("#2563EB")

  role UserRole @default(EJECUTIVO)

  activo Boolean @default(true)

  ultimoLogin DateTime?

  companies Company[] @relation("CompanyExecutive")

  prospects Prospect[] @relation("ProspectExecutive")

  Activity Activity[]

  quotes Quote[]

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([email])
}

//////////////////////////////////////////////////////
// COMPANY
//////////////////////////////////////////////////////

model Company {
  id String @id @default(cuid())

  razonSocial String

  nombreFantasia String?

  rut String @unique

  giro String?

  direccion String?

  comuna String?

  region String?

  telefono String?

  email String?

  sitioWeb String?

  tipo CompanyType @default(PROSPECTO)

  origen LeadSource?

  observaciones String?

  activo Boolean @default(true)

  ejecutivoId String?

  ejecutivo User? @relation("CompanyExecutive", fields: [ejecutivoId], references: [id])

  prospects Prospect[]

  activities Activity[]

  contacts Contact[]

  quotes Quote[]

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([rut])

  @@index([ejecutivoId])
}

model Prospect {
  id String @id @default(cuid())

  titulo String

  descripcion String?

  servicio String

  status ProspectStatus @default(NUEVO)

  valorEstimado Decimal? @db.Decimal(12, 2)

  fechaContacto DateTime?

  proximaAccion DateTime?

  companyId String?

  company Company? @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])

  ejecutivoId String?

  ejecutivo User? @relation("ProspectExecutive", fields: [ejecutivoId], references: [id])

  activities Activity[]

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  priority Priority @default(MEDIA)

  probabilidad Int @default(10)

  valorFinal Decimal? @db.Decimal(12, 2)

  fechaCierre DateTime?

  fechaPerdida DateTime?

  motivoPerdida String?

  @@index([status])
  @@index([companyId])
  @@index([ejecutivoId])
}

model Contact {
  id String @id @default(cuid())

  nombre String
  apellido String

  cargo String?

  telefono String?
  whatsapp String?

  email String?

  observaciones String?

  activo Boolean @default(true)

  companyId String

  company Company @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([companyId])
}

model Activity {
  id String @id @default(cuid())

  titulo String
  descripcion String?

  tipo ActivityType

  realizada Boolean @default(false)

  fecha DateTime @default(now())

  // Ahora es opcional
  prospectId String?
  prospect Prospect? @relation(fields: [prospectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  // Usuario que realizГі o creГі la actividad
  userId String
  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  // Empresa asociada
  companyId String?
  company Company? @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([prospectId])
  @@index([companyId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([fecha])
}

model Quote {

  id String @id @default(cuid())

  numero Int @unique

  estado QuoteStatus @default(BORRADOR)

  fecha DateTime @default(now())

  observaciones String?

  subtotal Decimal @default(0) @db.Decimal(12,2)

  descuento Decimal @default(0) @db.Decimal(12,2)

  iva Decimal @default(0) @db.Decimal(12,2)

  total Decimal @default(0) @db.Decimal(12,2)

  companyId String

  company Company @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  
  userId String

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  items QuoteItem[]

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([companyId])

  @@index([userId])

}

model QuoteItem {

  id String @id @default(cuid())

  descripcion String

  cantidad Decimal @db.Decimal(12,2)

  precio Decimal @db.Decimal(12,2)

  descuento Decimal @default(0) @db.Decimal(12,2)

  subtotal Decimal @db.Decimal(12,2)

  quoteId String

 quote Quote @relation(fields: [quoteId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([quoteId])

}
========== APP MODULE ==========
import { Module } from '@nestjs/common';

import { PrismaModule } from './prisma/prisma.module';
import { UsersModule } from './users/users.module';
import { AuthModule } from './auth/auth.module';
import { CompaniesModule } from './companies/companies.module';
import { ContactsModule } from './contacts/contacts.module';
import { ProspectsModule } from './prospects/prospects.module';
import { ActivitiesModule } from './activities/activities.module';
import { DashboardModule } from './dashboard/dashboard.module';

import { AppController } from './app.controller';
import { AppService } from './app.service';
import { CalendarController } from './calendar/calendar.controller';
import { CalendarService } from './calendar/calendar.service';
import { CalendarModule } from './calendar/calendar.module';
import { QuotesModule } from './quotes/quotes.module';


@Module({
  imports: [
    PrismaModule,
    UsersModule,
    AuthModule,
    CompaniesModule,
    ContactsModule,
    ProspectsModule,
    ActivitiesModule,
    DashboardModule,
    CalendarModule,
    QuotesModule,
  ],
  controllers: [AppController, CalendarController],
  providers: [AppService, CalendarService],
})
export class AppModule {}
